name: Hook Headline
description: Bold claim that stops the scroll

name: Testimonial
structure:
"[Specific result quote]"
- Name, Title
[Social proof line]
CTA

name: Stat Callout
structure:
[NUMBER]% [stat]
[What this means]
[How Brand solves this]
CTA

name: List Post
structure:

1. Point

3. Point
Save this.

name: Hot Take
structure:
Unpopular opinion: [bold claim]
[Evidence]
[Cost of alternative]
[Your position]
